title: WalletMasterKey spending key not zeroized on drop
description: core/src/wallet.rs: WalletMasterKey stores spending_key and chain_code as plain [u8; 32] fields with no Zeroize implementation. as_bytes() at line 69 returns a plain [u8; 64] copy of both keys. The struct derives Clone, which copies the raw key material without tracking the copy. The spending key is the root of the Zcash key hierarchy — if it leaks to a core dump, swap file, or debugger it exposes all derived child keys. Fix: impl Zeroize for WalletMasterKey and ZeroizeOnDrop (or use zeroize::Zeroizing wrappers for the fields). Remove Clone or restrict to Zeroizing-aware consumers.
